about-me-p1: Hi, my name's Matías Pendino, I'm 21 years old and I'm from Rosario, Argentina
about-me-p2: I always liked software, hence in 2019 I started to study by my own. In 2020, decided to enroll in the Bachelor of Software Development, that I finished in December 2022. Besides, in February 2023 I took the IELTS General Training English exam, in which I got a general qualification of 7 (CEFR C1).
about-me-p3: Currently I am a fullstack developer oriented to back-end, working mainly with Django, Django REST Framework and MySQL. I also develop mobile projects using Dart/Flitter, and other web projects with WordPress or a Django stack.
experience-muchticket-i1: Development of new features in the system.
experience-muchticket-i2: Integration of several payment methods as CyberSource, PayPal, SiemprePago, PlusPagos, and others.
experience-muchticket-i3: Use of technologies as Django, Django REST Framework, JQuery, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Git and Gitea.
experience-freelance-i1: E-commerce, personal and business websites design and development.
experience-freelance-i2: Development of mobile apps from scratch, and deployment on Google Play Store.
experience-freelance-i3: Use of several tools as Figma, Notion, Photoshop and Canva.
experience-litoral-i1: Control and stock entry in the website.
experience-litoral-i2: Aesthetic improvements and optimizations in the website
